name: MACD Ichimoku Tenkan Trend Sync
edge_hypothesis: MACD is the 3rd strongest promoted family (PPR 3.86, 5/10 promoted entries) — the zero-cross of MACDh is a proven momentum shift detector. Ichimoku TK v1 validated that Ichimoku's median-price structure detects transitions profitably (PF=1.604, all-regime). This spec combines MACDh zero-cross with Tenkan-Sen (ITS_9) as a fast trend filter. ITS_9 is NOT a moving average — it is the 9-period midpoint of high and low: (highest-high + lowest-low) / 2. This makes it respond to PRICE STRUCTURE (range boundaries) rather than closing prices like EMA/SMA/T3/KAMA. When MACDh crosses above zero while close is above ITS_9, both momentum (MACD) AND price structure (Ichimoku midpoint) agree on direction. This is a novel combination: the Ichimoku TK v1 ACCEPT used TK crossover (ITS crosses IKS); this spec uses ITS as a standalone trend filter paired with MACD momentum, testing whether Ichimoku's median-price concept has value INDEPENDENT of the TK crossover mechanism. If profitable, it confirms ITS as a general-purpose baseline — not just an Ichimoku-specific signal.

variants.name: macd_ichimoku_tenkan_v1_8to1
variants.description: Core variant. MACDh zero-cross + ITS_9 trend filter. 8:1 R:R (12x ATR TP, 1.5 ATR stop). Tests whether Ichimoku Tenkan-Sen as a fast median-price baseline improves MACD's momentum entries compared to EMA-based filters used in existing MACD promoted specs.

components.notes: Ichimoku Tenkan-Sen — 9-period median-price midpoint (high+low)/2. Responds to price structure, not closing prices. Faster than any standard MA.
MACD histogram zero-cross — proven momentum shift detector. PPR 3.86 in promoted library.

variants.name: macd_ichimoku_tenkan_v1_12to1
variants.description: Extended TP variant. 12:1 R:R (18x ATR TP). MACD tight 7:1 achieved PPR 3.86 — testing whether the ITS trend filter produces cleaner entries that sustain longer moves, justifying the wider TP. Transition-detection entries historically benefit from wider TPs (Vortex v2 trans PF=4.321 at 12:1).

components.notes: Tenkan-Sen median-price baseline — wider TP tests transition ride potential.
MACD histogram momentum shift — zero-cross entry.

variants.name: macd_ichimoku_tenkan_v1_wide_stop_8to1
variants.description: Wide stop variant. 2.0 ATR stop with 16x ATR TP (8:1 R:R maintained). Standard 1.5 ATR stop may be too tight for transition entries — the EMA200 family showed that tight stops + transition detection = incompatible (3 generations, all DD>20%). A 2.0 ATR stop gives more room for the transition to develop while maintaining the 8:1 R:R.

components.notes: Wide 2.0x ATR stop — learned from EMA200 family failure that tight stops kill transition entries.

advisory_context.novel_element: ITS_9 (Tenkan-Sen) as standalone trend filter with MACD — tests whether Ichimoku's median-price concept has value INDEPENDENT of TK crossover. ITS is NOT a moving average (it's high-low midpoint), making this mathematically distinct from all prior MACD+MA combinations.

indicator_roles.baseline: ITS_9 — Ichimoku Tenkan-Sen, 9-period median-price midpoint. Responds to price structure not closing prices.
indicator_roles.confirmation: MACDh_12_26_9 — MACD histogram zero-cross, proven momentum shift detector (PPR 3.86, 5/10 promoted)
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework
